title: May 28, 2026
sentiment: The machines get smarter, the surveillance tighter, but a hand that moves in shared understanding needs no translation.

stories.title: Claude Opus 4.8
stories.summary: Anthropic releases a new frontier model — another step in the quiet acceleration that is reshaping what intelligence means.

stories.title: Cars collect a startling amount of data about you
stories.summary: The modern vehicle is a surveillance device on wheels, and the systems that watch us grow more intimate by the year.

stories.title: Italians and Dutch share the same gestural instinct for teaching
stories.summary: Across cultures, hands find the same shapes when explaining ideas — a reminder that communication runs deeper than language.
